overview: Rural Biz Platform is a comprehensive rural entrepreneurship system connecting farmers, youth, women, and small business starters in agriculture, fishery, poultry, and goat farming with experts for guidance, case management, and resource supply.
features: Hero homepage with 'Skill + Support + System' tagline and sector icons
Internet Identity login with user profile (name, mobile, location)
Service request form with photo upload and unique Case ID
Personal dashboard to track case status, assigned expert, and next steps
Admin panel for case management, expert assignment, and status updates
Expert management with profiles, assignment, and activity tracking
Resource catalog (goat breeds, fish seeds, poultry, seeds & feed) with supply requests
Contact & Support page with call button, WhatsApp link, and FAQ
